title: pelargonium × peelii
intro: Pelargonium × peelii, also known as the Cape Geranium or Cape Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium genus, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. The health benefits of Pelargonium × peelii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and provide relief from headaches and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
